outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file. File.SHA1 The SHA1 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The SHA256 hash of the file. File.Name The full file name (including file extension).
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The path where the file is located. File.Hostname The name of the host where the file was found.
outputs.name: File.Path

outputs.description: The vendor that reported the file as malicious. File.Malicious.Description A description of why the file was determined to be malicious.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score. DBotScore.Reliability Reliability of the source providing the intelligence data.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
